filters.q: from:(builtin.com OR wellfound.com OR linkedin.com) subject:(job)

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO jobs (job_id, source, title, company, location, url, salary_min, salary_max, employment_type, posted_at, raw_json)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.job_id }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  '{{ $json.title }}',
  {{ $json.company ? `'${$json.company.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.location ? `'${$json.location.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.url ? `'${$json.url.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.salary_min ?? 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.salary_max ?? 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.employment_type || "unknown" }}',
  {{ $json.posted_at ? `'${$json.posted_at}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (job_id) DO UPDATE SET last_seen = NOW()
RETURNING *, (xmax = 0) AS is_new;
